title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has acquired Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in a landmark $10 billion deal, signaling a major wave of biotech mergers and acquisitions. The transaction underscores growing consolidation trends as large-cap biotechs seek to expand their pipelines and market position through strategic acquisitions.

title: Elevance sues government over $115 million tied to Medicare Advantage star ratings
summary: Health insurer Elevance has filed a lawsuit against the federal government disputing $115 million linked to Medicare Advantage star ratings. The dispute centers on how risk-adjustment algorithms factor into CMS quality score calculations, with implications for insurer reimbursement and the Clover Health model.

title: CDC leadership continues to try to manufacture a scientific debate on vaccines where none exists
summary: The article argues that CDC leadership is attempting to create controversy around vaccine effectiveness measurement methodologies, specifically the test-negative design, where none scientifically exists. The piece criticizes political interference in public health science and raises concerns about undermining vaccination confidence.
